plan_type_rationale: Single file documentation edit. No source changes, no public API surface changes, no blast radius beyond docs/CLI.md.

phases.title: Add 4 CLI sections to docs/CLI.md
phases.goal: Document coderef-analyze, coderef-query, coderef-detect-languages, and coderef-semantic-integration in CLI.md matching existing format

tasks.description: Add 4 rows to Command Overview table in docs/CLI.md: coderef-analyze, coderef-query, coderef-detect-languages, coderef-semantic-integration
tasks.success_criteria: Table has 4 new rows with correct anchor links, purpose summaries, and key flags

tasks.description: Add coderef-analyze section to docs/CLI.md: description of 12 analysis types, options table (--project, --type, --output, --element, --depth, --from, --to, --help), examples for each type, exit codes
tasks.success_criteria: Section present after existing entries; all 12 analysis types documented with usage notes for type-specific required flags (--element for impact/multi-hop, --from for breaking-changes)

tasks.description: Add coderef-query section to docs/CLI.md: description of 8 query types, options table (--project, --type, --target, --source, --depth, --format, --help), examples, exit codes. Note: --source required for shortest-path and all-paths.
tasks.success_criteria: Section present; 8 query types listed; conditional --source requirement documented

tasks.description: Add coderef-detect-languages section to docs/CLI.md: description, options table (--project, --ignore-file, --json, --help), examples, exit codes
tasks.success_criteria: Section present; bin name documented as coderef-detect-languages (not detect-languages)

tasks.description: Add coderef-semantic-integration section to docs/CLI.md: description, options table (--project, --output, --registry, --dry-run, --no-headers, --no-enrich, --no-sync-registry, --file, --validate-idempotency, --help), examples, exit codes
tasks.success_criteria: Section present; all 8 flags documented; --validate-idempotency mode described

tasks.description: git add docs/CLI.md && git commit referencing WO-CLI-DOCS-GAP-FILL-001 and DISPATCH-2026-05-11-013
tasks.success_criteria: Clean commit; all 4 sections present in committed file
